message:
🐛 Add back button to failed and default mission states (#2304)

Back button was only rendered inside the completed status block,
trapping users in running/failed/pending conversations with no way
to return to the mission list. Add the same back-to-missions button
to the failed and default (running/pending/waiting_input) branches.

Fixes #2216

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
